posts.author: TateDemarcus
posts.title: BREAKING: Anthropic's latest models of Claude AI banned to foreign nationals by US govt, citing national security concerns

link_metadata.description: “The US government, citing national security authorities, has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national.”
link_metadata.title: BREAKING: Anthropic’s latest models of Claude AI banned to foreign nationals by US govt, citing national security concerns

posts.author: TateDemarcus
posts.title: British Government Gives Religious Exemption For Suicide Vests

link_metadata.description: LONDON — In an ongoing effort to balance religious freedom and public safety, the government of the United Kingdom decided to grant exemptions for committed Muslims who wish to don suicide vests for religious and ceremonial purposes.
link_metadata.title: British Government Gives Religious Exemption For Suicide Vests

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: La Sagrada Familia Catholic Church Completed After 144 years.  Construction began in Barcelona, Spain in 1882. Pope Leo XIV arrived in the city this week to inaugurate the basilica’s final tower, the Torre de Jesucristo.

link_metadata.description: This week, Barcelona welcomed Pope Leo XIV to inaugurate La Sagrada Familia, complete after 144 years. But how will the city's anti-tourist locals respond to record-breaking levels of visitors?
link_metadata.title: Sagrada Familia is finally complete - but how will locals respond?

posts.title: Customers hit with automatic 20% gratuities as restaurants combat "tipping confusion"

link_metadata.description: Automatic gratuities at World Cup restaurants spark debate as operators weigh protecting tipped workers against potential consumer backlash over fees.
link_metadata.title: Customers hit with automatic 20% gratuities as restaurants combat tipping confusion

posts.author: kinbergfan
posts.title: My favorite "witch hunt" for fraud was Bob Dornan's 1996 House campaign. Dem Loretta Sanchez finished ahead by 984 votes. Dornan cried foul, but a bipartisan Congressional inquiry found only 748 illegal votes--624 from non-citizens. Nothing to see there!

posts.title: I just found out my son is a Trump supporter... how can I fix him???

posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: CORNYN REBUKES Lee OVER SAVE ACT: Sen. John Cornyn tells Sen. Mike Lee he backs the SAVE America Act yet lacks votes needed, calling it math and arguing Republican infighting damages prospects for winning the majority in November.

quotedTweet.content:
We will *not* regret putting in the hard work to pass the SAVE America Act—even though it will take weeks, requiring hard work.

We will regret *not* passing it.

Are the long weekends and recesses really worth losing our country?

Of course not.

@LeaderJohnThune, let’s do this!

twitter.content: Mike, I am a co-sponsor and have repeatedly voted for this but you don’t have the votes. @LeaderJohnThune can’t change that. It is math. Try focusing on Democrats instead of Republicans.  Republican on Republican attacks are hurting our chances to win the majority in November.

posts.author: dirtysanchez69
posts.title: Me too, amigo

posts.author: IlhansBrother
posts.title:
So when a mosque has a fire, (they set themselves) community leaders get 112 million.

When Jews were stabbed, community leaders got 25 million.

When a Northern Irishman gets his eyes gouged out and nearly decapitated, Irish community leaders get arrested.

twitter.content:
Northern Ireland police deploy late night snatch squads grabbing community leaders to deter future anti-migrant protests.

Did they ever do anything like this during Black Lives Matter or the Palestine marches?
